items.name: NamedPanel
items.doc: A parsed named panel with resolved ratio.

items.name: SplitDir
items.signature: pub enum SplitDir { H, V }  /// Parse DSL v2 string into a flat list of named panels (horizontal split only at top level). /// Nested VSplit ("header/content/footer") returns panels in row order. pub fn parse_named(dsl: &str) -> Vec<NamedPanel>

items.name: parse_named
items.doc:
Parse DSL v2 string into a flat list of named panels (horizontal split only at top level).
Nested VSplit ("header/content/footer") returns panels in row order.

items.name: to_panels
items.doc: Convert named panels to ratio_solver Panels (ready for drag()).
